name: Dynamix File Recycle Bin
author: xO-ox-ai
description: A guarded recycle bin for Unraid's official built-in Dynamix File Manager with a validated per-disk/per-dataset allowlist. It does not intercept SMB, terminal, application, container, or third-party file-manager deletes. Do not manually alter anything inside .RecycleBin. Bilingual UI (English + Chinese).
overview: Adds per-volume recycle support to Unraid's official built-in Dynamix File Manager, with age/capacity maintenance and history tracking. 为 Unraid 官方内置 Dynamix 文件浏览器添加按卷隔离的安全回收站、维护策略和历史记录。
